idea-plugin.name: ROS Interface Syntax Highlighter
idea-plugin.description:
ROS Interface Syntax Highlighting for CLion

Provides syntax highlighting for ROS Interface definition files:

  • .msg - ROS Message definitions
  • .srv - ROS Service definitions
  • .action - ROS Action definitions

Features

  • Syntax highlighting for built-in types (bool, int32, float64, string, etc.)
  • Highlighting of package/type references (std_msgs/Header)
  • Field name and constant highlighting
  • Number, float, and boolean literal highlighting
  • Quoted and unquoted string highlighting
  • Comment highlighting (# line comments)
  • Separator highlighting (---, ===, MSG:)
  • @optional attribute highlighting
  • Array bracket matching

Uses the ROS Interface TextMate grammar via the IntelliJ TextMate Bundles plugin for reliable, high-quality syntax highlighting.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.3

  • Refactored to use TextMate bundle loaded via BundledTextMateResourcesProvider
  • Removed custom PSI/lexer layer; TextMate grammar now handles all tokenization
  • Improved compatibility with CLion 2024.3 and later

1.0.1

  • Switched to TextMate-only architecture for reliable highlighting
  • Fixed TextMate bundle loading in packaged plugin

1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Syntax highlighting for .msg, .srv, .action files via TextMate bundle
